input.text:
```python
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
x = [1, 2, 3, 4]
y = [86.8, 93.0, 315.7, 234.4]
plt.figure(figsize=(6,4))
plt.plot(x, y, marker='o')
plt.xlabel('Pair Index')
plt.ylabel('Distance (meters)')
plt.title('Aircraft Separation Distances')
plt.grid(True)
plt.show()
```
